message:
fix(test): simplify cached detail fixtures and update search surface snapshots

Simplify the app_with_cached_conversation test fixture: remove the
manual source_path override since app_with_hits already generates paths
like "/path/0" that align with the cached_detail key. Update three
regression tests (detail_open_cache_hit, detail_find_navigation, and
the fixture itself) to use the natural "/path/0" key instead of
the hardcoded "test-session" string.

Update 8 search surface snapshots to reflect two UI improvements:
- Result rows now show token count inline (e.g. "43 tok") next to the
  workspace badge for quick at-a-glance cost visibility
- Footer stats bar now shows richer aggregate info: "1 sessions | 1 msgs
  | 43 tok | est <$0.001" instead of just "1 hits"

Also syncs .beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
